underlying_goal: Summarize the latest on-call issues from a Slack channel (#dlp-oncall) using Claude Code's Slack MCP integration
friction_detail: Slack MCP tools were initially unavailable due to permission issues, and Claude first matched the wrong channel (epdlp-oncall instead of dlp-oncall).
brief_summary: User wanted to summarize their Slack #dlp-oncall channel; after setup friction and a channel mismatch, Claude successfully retrieved and summarized the latest on-call issues.
